description: Map of modal/overlay selectors discovered in the repo (conservative, read-only inventory).

index.html.notes: Newsletter modal: #newsletter-modal uses class 'modal', attribute 'data-modal', overlay uses 'data-modal-close', triggers use 'data-modal-target'.

modalModule.notes: Module selects '[data-modal-target]' triggers, uses '[data-modal-close]' for close, sets aria-modal and tabindex on dialog elements.

recommendation: Keep existing data-modal hooks as canonical selectors. When adding new modals, use data-modal on container, data-modal-target on triggers and data-modal-close on overlays/buttons. Preserve role="dialog" and aria-modal attributes for a11y.
